studies.title: Evaluation of the online-based self-help program "Selfapy" for patients with panic disorder

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'Selfapy,' which matches the product name, and it specifies the clinical area of panic disorder, aligning with the described DTx. While the abstract and intervention details are not available, the title provides sufficient evidence to confirm relevance.

_classification.reason: The study evaluates an online-based self-help program, which suggests a real-world observational design rather than a controlled interventional trial. However, lack of detailed information reduces confidence.
